library: כיא פריז · ספריית קיימברידג' · ספריית קיימברידג'
description: Agreement between Shelomo b. Kathīr and Barhūn b. Sahlān, the husband of his daughter Fāʾiza, in which Barhūn undertakes to redeem the silver vessels belonging to his wife and which he had obviously pawned. January 27, 1028 CE. This is the direct continuation of T-S 13J5.1C. (ENA NS 7.25 and T-S 8K20.1 are also somehow connected to at least one of the records on these fragments.) The son-in-law was not able to produce the receipt, as promised on 1/23. (Information from Goitein's index card)
description_he: הסכם בין שלמה בן כת'יר ובארהון בן סהלאן, חתנו: בארהון מתחייב לפדות כלי כסף של אשתו פאאיזה שמישכן. 27 ינואר 1028.
